overview.subtitle: A clean starter dashboard is ready for budgets, categories, and transaction history.
overview.title: Monthly spending snapshot
overview.body: You are on track this month. Add transactions, budgets, and reports on top of this base architecture.
overview.sheet_body: This project already includes MVVM plus Cubit structure, GoRouter navigation, shared overlays, ScreenUtil, localization, launcher icon tooling, and native splash tooling.
overview.error: Unable to load your dashboard preview.

home.title: My Finances
home.no_spending_desc: Add your first expense to see category breakdowns here.
home.no_transactions_desc: Your latest expenses will appear here after you add them.

settings.title: Settings
settings.no_subcategories: This category has no subcategories yet.
settings.delete_desc: This will remove "{}" and move any linked expenses to another category.
settings.delete_move_notice: Expenses in this category will be moved to another category automatically.

add_expense.hint: Use the keypad below to enter the amount and tap the checkmark when you are ready to save.
add_expense.summary_desc: Confirm your category, subcategory, and date before saving.

profile.title: Profile
profile.delete_warning: Permanently delete your account and all associated ledger data. This action cannot be undone.

auth.tagline: Experience the next generation of financial intelligence and asset management.
